feat.name: Rolling White Bottle Form
feat.text: As you fall to the ground, you transform into a white bottle, gourd, or sake jar, then roll away before anyone can pick you up. You Crawl up to two times, and your movement doesn’t provoke reactions—you somehow always roll just out of reach. When you come to a stop, you return to your tanuki form, face down on the ground.

traits.name: Tanuki
traits.text: A name for both a raccoon-like animal native to Minkai and sapient tanuki who possess shapeshifting powers.

feat.trigger: You Drop Prone or othwerwise become prone
